mapper.insert: insert into advisor_product_flow_log (product_id, product_version_id, operator_id, action_type, comment) values (#{productId}, #{productVersionId}, #{operatorId}, #{actionType}, #{comment})
mapper.select: select id, product_id as productId, product_version_id as productVersionId, operator_id as operatorId, action_type as actionType, comment, created_at as createdAt from advisor_product_flow_log where product_id = #{productId} order by created_at desc, id desc
